title: SkillSpec generated startup-router target

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Implement the first #960 skill-generation lane slice by rendering a compact generated startup-router skill from SkillSpec and proving it preserves the intended startup-routing behavior contract.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep scope bounded to one generated SkillSpec target, generated output, and behavior-focused tests. Do not introduce a broad plugin-generation framework or make generated targets the source of product behavior.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Bounded decomposition, touched-path narrowing, validation tightening, and plan-local residue routing.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.
canonical_core.next_action: Pick one generated SkillSpec target and prove behavior equivalence before broad generation work.
canonical_core.proof_expectations: ['uv run pytest tests/test_contract_tooling.py::test_skill_specs_contract_models_startup_and_planning_behavior tests/test_contract_tooling.py::test_skillspec_generated_startup_target_preserves_behavior_contract tests/test_workspace_skills_cli.py::test_generated_startup_router_skill_is_compact_adapter_projection -q', 'uv run ruff check src/agentic_workspace/contract_tooling.py scripts/generate/generate_skillspec_targets.py tests/test_contract_tooling.py tests/test_workspace_skills_cli.py', 'uv run python scripts/generate/generate_skillspec_targets.py --check', 'uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py --quiet-success', 'make test-workspace', 'make lint-workspace']
canonical_core.completion_criteria: ['SkillSpec marks startup-router ready for rendering.', 'A generated startup-router SKILL.md exists under generated/workspace/skills/startup-router.', 'The generated skill preserves preferred CLI, no-CLI fallback, allowed/forbidden actions, proof/closeout guidance, and direct/lane/fallback behavior fixtures.', 'Tests prove checked-in generated output matches the renderer and remains compact.']
